summary: Job Seeker Profile Features Testing Complete. Backend: 10/10 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All 4 feature areas verified and working. Fixed backend UserProfileUpdate model to include linkedin_url and portfolio_url fields.
critical_code_review_comments: Header dropdown for job_seeker role correctly shows Profile, Notifications, and Sign Out - implementation in Navigation.js getDropdownItems()
Profile picture upload implemented with data-testid='profile-picture-btn' camera button and hidden file input
Video upload zone in Media tab is clickable with data-testid='video-upload-zone'
Media tab correctly shows only LinkedIn Profile and Personal Website/Portfolio fields - GitHub and Other links removed
Profile completion points display working - shows X/100 format with trophy progress indicator
Fixed: UserProfileUpdate model was missing linkedin_url and portfolio_url fields - now added to /app/backend/models/schemas.py
context_for_next_testing_agent: Job seeker profile features fully tested. Key endpoints: POST /api/uploads/profile-picture, POST /api/uploads/video, PUT /api/profile (now supports linkedin_url and portfolio_url), GET /api/auth/me (returns profile_progress). Frontend: Navigation.js has dropdown for job_seeker with Profile/Notifications/SignOut, ProfileDashboard.js has all profile tabs working including Media tab.

header_dropdown_for_job_seeker.details: Dropdown shows Profile, Notifications, and Sign Out under user name. Uses data-testid='user-dropdown-trigger' and data-testid='user-dropdown-menu'

profile_picture_upload.details: Camera button (data-testid='profile-picture-btn') opens file picker via hidden input (data-testid='profile-picture-input'). Endpoint POST /api/uploads/profile-picture exists.

video_upload_in_media_tab.details: Video upload zone (data-testid='video-upload-zone') is clickable and triggers file input (data-testid='video-upload-input'). Endpoint POST /api/uploads/video exists. Max 50MB.

linkedin_and_portfolio_inputs.details: LinkedIn input (data-testid='linkedin-input') and Portfolio input (data-testid='portfolio-input') are editable. Save button saves to PUT /api/profile.

github_other_links_removed.details: GitHub and Other link fields have been removed from Media tab as requested.

profile_completion_points.details: Profile completion displays X/100 points with trophy progress. Points calculated via calculate_profile_progress() function based on: profile_picture (+5), about_me 50+ chars (+10), work_experience (+10), 5+ skills (+20), education (+10), achievements (+10), intro_video (+20), job_applications 5+ (+10)

bug_fixes_applied.issue: UserProfileUpdate model missing linkedin_url and portfolio_url fields
bug_fixes_applied.fix: Added linkedin_url: Optional[str] = None and portfolio_url: Optional[str] = None to the model
bug_fixes_applied.impact: Media links now properly save and persist when updated via PUT /api/profile
